Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
businesses you don't know
Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing> 	Thu, Jun 15, 2017 at 11:41 AM
To: Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
Businesses we Don’t know:
Pleasure to connect [FIRST NAME]!
I'm reaching out to you after seeing what you’ve been doing with your brand recently! I was seeking out who our agency
could help most, and thought of you after seeing what you've been doing.
We've helped businesses achieve some of the following:
[bragging point about yourself and your company]
[bragging point about yourself and your company]
[bragging point about yourself and your company]
[bragging point about yourself and your company]
Our CEO started the advertising and creative agency [] months ago, and we've sustained an average of $__+ in gross client
returns since only working with ___ exclusive clients. We only work with those we know we can help drive returns!
We'd love to discuss what we can do for you and your business. Are you open today?
Don't look at it like a sales call, If we can help awesome! If we can't help, our fullest intention is to help a fellow
entrepreneur better their digital marketing strategy through what we know we can pass onto you that will help.
Let me know a good time and day we can give you this execution plan we'd like to create for you! Call or text me at [YOUR
CELL # HERE] or email me at [YOUR NAME]@[YOUR EMAIL]
We're very excited to speak with you. Talk soon!
Jeremy Haynes
CEO/Founder
Megalodon Marketing, LLC
7904 West Drive, Miami Beach, FL 33141
(305) 9152770
